title: Full blue Netherite & Ancient Debris
description: A resource pack which changes the ancien debris/Netherite texture to better see it while classic/lava mining
body:
A resource pack that changes the ancien debris/Netherite texture to optimize Netherite classic/lava mining. /!\ These pictures were taken with a mod wich removes the lava fog! There are also ressourcepacks to : - have the most optimize Netherite Lava mining Setup -> [Full Netherite Lava Mining Setup](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/full-netherite-lava-mining-setup) - have everything looking netherack except netherite -> [Netherite lava Mining]([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/netherite-lava-mining](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/netherite-lava-mining)) - hide only Gravel -> [Gravel into Netherrack Ressourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gravel-into-netherack) - hide only Nether Ores -> [Nether Ores into Netherrack Ressourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nether-ores-into-netherrack) **An issue/question ? -> Send me a message on discord : enigmusse**

**Compatibility Notice** The resource pack functions correctly despite the compatibility warning. Simply confirm by selecting **Yes** when prompted. To suppress this notification completely, install the mod: - [No Resource Pack Warnings (Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings) Without this solution, I'd need to create and upload a separate archive for nearly every minor Minecraft version — even though the textures remain unchanged — leading to unnecessary extra work.
